custom.notes: Wild expands to full reel BEFORE ways evaluation in FS and hot spins. A 4+-scatter trigger plays STICKY expansion: expanded reels stay fully wild for the rest of the round. While ALL stickyTowerCap towers stand, every sticky spin pays x stickyFullBoardMultiplier (FULL HOUSE — the 4-scatter max-win engine). Fully wild reels contribute no scatters. Reel 1 carries no wilds (no wild-line double count). Wild pays as highA.

viceBuyStages.fsStripsRule: buy3 BOUGHT round only: simulExpandMultipliers override {3:2, 4:6} (natural {3:2,4:10} untouched); FS strips = natural strips + 1 wild added on reels 0, 3 and 4 (replacing the currently most common LOW 6/7/8, tie->lower id, at the stop nearest evenly spread targets around the existing wild / reel 0: its scatter), then reel 4 evenly padded with 16 least-common-LOW stops (wild+scatter COUNTS unchanged except the deliberate wild adds; scatter counts NEVER change). retrigger +3, 7 spins cap 10 as natural.
viceBuyStages.note: BOUGHT round only: simul-expand table {3:2,4:6} instead of the natural {3:2,4:10} (tail tamed) + wild-buffed strips (+1 wild reels 0/3/4). Natural 3sc rounds untouched. 800k rounds.

viceBuyStages.fsStripsRule: buy4 BOUGHT round only: sticky towerCap 4 + fullBoard x2 while all 4 towers stand (unchanged); FS strips = natural strips + 1 wild added on reel 1 (replacing the currently most common LOW, tie->lower id, nearest the evenly spread target around its existing wild), then reel 2 padded with 2200 and reel 1 with 36 least-common-LOW stops at the strip midpoint (recomputed per insertion). Reel 2 becomes the single ultra-rare full-board gate (tail), reels 1/3/4 carry the body. Scatter counts NEVER change. retrigger +3, 10 spins cap 13 as natural.
viceBuyStages.note: BOUGHT round only: 4th sticky tower + x2 while all four stand (5000x reachable 1-in-822) + wild add reel 1, reel 2 wild-frequency diluted. Natural 4sc rounds keep cap 3 / x1. 300k rounds.

anteBet.label: 3x FREE SPINS CHANCE
anteBet.rule: base strips + 1 extra scatter on the first 3 of 5 strips (inserted opposite the existing scatter, replacing the most common LOW, tie->lower id)

params.note: no fly-to-center collect; win anim + zoom only

params.presentation: forced stops carry the bought scatter count — 2 land, tease arms, rest drop like a natural trigger; board evaluated in full (display == payout)

params.label: 3x FREE SPINS CHANCE
params.note: toggle: every spin costs bet x anteBet.costMult and runs on anteBet.reelStrips (certified ~3x natural trigger chance)

idle.placement: replaces static art on resting cells, random start frame

win.placement: FS-trigger beat, grows 1.28 over resting look

frameWinFlash.placement: overlays the frame texture at region; one-shot on 3rd scatter land

params.overlay: game-area only, bar = real load fraction

machineBox.reelSetOrigin: container at (framePad, framePad) inside the machine box, machine box at y=headerH

renderer.resolutionRule: FIXED floor 2 (supersampling) — max(2, min(devicePixelRatio, 2)); autoDensity true; antialias true
renderer.filterResolution: 'inherit' — filters MUST inherit the floor-2 resolution or they render pixelated
renderer.spritesheetPlayback: one texture per sheet file, frames cut as sub-rectangles (no per-frame images); advance frames on a ticker at the sheet fps — never re-upload textures per frame

scaleToFit.fruitstacksExtra: scatterpays additionally shifts the scene down by height*0.045

symbolDraw.note: objectScale 1.3 = the 'large' symbol-size preset (default); art is square-stretched to targetSize in both axes

sizeMuls.comment: SYMBOL_SIZE_MULS overrides set in the vice branch (src/App.tsx:358-359). Base rule without an override (src/game/AnimatedSymbol.ts:842): scatter 1.2, all others 1.0.
sizeMuls.note: ids 0-9 all set to 0.8 first, then scatter id 1 overwritten to 0.96

staticLook.comment: scatter keeps clean static look — no landing squash, no idle/featured warping (App.tsx:399)

noIdle.comment: wild keeps hard landing slam but no fallback idle breathing (App.tsx:402)

winSheetFramed.comment: EMPTY for vice — only Crack Farm adds ids 1-8; vice win sheets render with the default soft-mask vignette treatment

idleSheets.comment: 9s seamless loop replaces static scatter art on the board

staticArt.coinNote: COIN(9) has no baked art — falls back to theme

tease.preset: universal-anticipation (TEASE_PRESETS[0] is the default active; vice never switches it — src/game/effects/teaseRegistry.ts:25-29)
tease.scatterLandedFxNote: teaseTuning.scatterLandedFx = false set in vice branch (App.tsx:362) — no burst/brackets/dim on landed cells; pending-reel gold gate + rising embers stay

cameraPovDolly.formula: scale = 1.06 + 0.05 * step (step 0 = 2nd scatter landed, +1 per landed teased reel) — PixiApp.ts:4519
cameraPovDolly.pinned: machine centre; on HIT the lock is kept until the FS iris black beat

waysImmersive.comment: vice does NOT disable it (only crackfarm/fruitstacks do) — the leap/dance IS vice's win presentation and it suppresses the ways-light comet + line/dot decoration (ReelSet.ts:1918)

danceValues.timeline: up 0.15s power3.out; wiggle rot 0.08/0.12/0.12s sine; slam down 0.11s power3.in @0.22; return 0.3s back.out(3.5) @0.33

waysLightConfig.cellSize: 120 (set by ReelSet from grid cell width)

winLineColor.default: 0xFFC53D (WIN_LINE_COLOR, warm-gold line underlay + dot ring — ReelSet.ts:47)

marquee.sizeMulExpr: setWinTierGeometry({ sizeMul: 0.48 * 1.3 }) — vice call, App.tsx:365; base default 0.48, +30% Noski
marquee.geometry: VICE_GEO (default, kept because vice passes only sizeMul): tierCy { big: 0.2273, mega: 0.2463, epic: 0.2495, max: 0.2269 }, winCy 0.4875, plateCy 0.7681, plateH 0.374, contentFrac 0.911, contentCy (0.0444+0.9546)/2 = 0.4995

config.maxNote: MAX tier only when the max-win cap is hit, not a band

tallyHooks.terminator: play('win-tally-end') when the number lands or on skip
tallyHooks.mutedNote: win-tally-tick / win-tally-end / tier-up all at design volume 0 (audio rollback, Noski 'audio fatal') — hooks stay wired, re-enable by dropping real .ogg + raising volume

statePreset.comment: vice never calls setActiveStatePreset — active stays STATE_PRESETS[0] = untouched FALLBACK_TIMINGS (src/config/symbolAnimations.ts)

landingImpactConfig.comment: module defaults from src/game/effects/LandingImpact.ts — vice branch does not touch them (only crackfarm/fruitstacks override)

logo.placement: top (setTitleImage default layout — vice passes no layout arg)
logo.sizeRule: scale = min((gridWidth*0.6)/texW, 150/texH) — max 60% of grid width AND max 150 scene-px tall; anchor (0.5, 1); x = rw/2; y = HEADER_H - 2 (bottom edge just above frame) — PixiApp.ts:730-738

frame.windowNote: true transparent hole measured from the 1500x1500 art's alpha, passed explicitly (App.tsx:412)

baseLoop.note: cross-faded seamless loop over the static art

expandingWild.expectedArt: 512x2560 px (5x5) / 512x1484 px (5x3) — height-fit to active grid

gameFactor.rule: scale = min(scaleX, scaleY, 1.3) * factor — PixiApp.ts:610; extra clamp keeps grid out of the HUD band

renderer.resolution: max(2, min(devicePixelRatio, 2)) = always exactly 2 (sharpness floor/cap — PixiApp.ts:328)

introScreens.game: 18 layers — bg background_intro_screen_vice.webp; 3 cards tw300 @(532,545)/(963,655)/(1385,540); logos: bonus tw250@(963,472), expanding tw265@(534,345), max tw175@(1385,298), sticky tw210@(532,295), vice_heat tw440@(963,200), vice tw180@(963,425), win tw205@(1385,352); symbols: max_win tw275@(1385,535), scatter_landing tw211@(963,604), wild tw112@(532,514); texts: max_win tw205@(1385,664), scatter tw222@(963,774), wild tw245@(532,672); press tw360@(960,985)
introScreens.fs3: 6 layers — bg, card@(960,544), logo@(960,232), press@(960,972), scatter symbol tw296@(960,472), text@(960,711)
introScreens.fs4: 6 layers — bg, card@(960,544), logo@(959,233), press@(960,826), scatter symbol tw296@(960,472), text@(960,704)
introScreens.outro: 3 layers — fsbg_beachclub.webp bg, totalwin.webp tw640@(960,355), press.webp tw360@(960,962)

win-small.note: INTENTIONAL design choice (Noski): the classic win jingles ship as EXAMPLE sounds at volume 0 — the marquee music + coin-chime swish carry the win audio. Activating = pick a file in the Sound-Bibliothek or raise the volume; files exist (audio/win-small.ogg etc.). Nothing is missing or waiting on recordings.

win-normal.note: see win-small — intentional volume-0 example sound, activate via library/volume

win-big.note: see win-small — intentional volume-0 example sound, activate via library/volume

win-mega.note: see win-small — intentional volume-0 example sound, activate via library/volume

free-spin-trigger.note: fires the moment the LAST reel stops with 3+ scatters landed (onTeaseEnd hit)

reel-spin-loop.note: OFF for vice — no bed under the spin

win-tally-tick.note: tally/tier hooks are wired but muted: the synthesized placeholders sounded wrong; drop a real .ogg under audio/<id>.ogg and raise the volume to enable

win-tally-end.note: tally/tier hooks are wired but muted: the synthesized placeholders sounded wrong; drop a real .ogg under audio/<id>.ogg and raise the volume to enable

tier-up.note: tally/tier hooks are wired but muted: the synthesized placeholders sounded wrong; drop a real .ogg under audio/<id>.ogg and raise the volume to enable

tease-riser.note: 10s rising-tension bed (scanning alarm), cut by the resolve

tease-miss.note: dull negative tap on the miss

audio.srcRule: oggFirst: [/audio/<id>.ogg, /audio/<id>.mp3]; otherwise [/audio/<id>.wav, /audio/<id>.ogg, /audio/<id>.mp3]; unknown event volume fallback 0.7 (unused — all 20 registry events have explicit volumes)
audio.viceNote: vice makes ZERO replaceSource calls — the defaultSoundConfig map above IS the vice mix verbatim

uiSfx.rule: HTMLAudio, follows master mute + volume (effective = vol * sm.volume)

mixingRules.marqueeStart: duck('ambient-music', 300ms fade to 0, keeps looping muted) + play('win-marquee')
mixingRules.marqueeEnd: fadeStop('win-marquee', smooth ? 900 : 260 ms) + unduck('ambient-music', smooth ? 700 : 400 ms)
mixingRules.duckDefaults: SoundManager duck default 350ms, unduck default 450ms (overridden by the explicit values above)
mixingRules.reelSpinLoopFade: fadeStop 450ms the moment reel 0 stops; safety fadeStop 90ms when all reels stopped
mixingRules.scatterDingLadder: rate = 1 + min(n,3)*0.14 per scatter in one landing sequence; counter resets after 4000ms silence
mixingRules.winStepChimeLadder: rate = 1 + min(index,8)*0.09 per connection (vice keeps the chime ladder; no per-symbol quips)
mixingRules.winStingerGate: state-driven win-small/normal/big/mega thresholds 2x/10x/50x bet; ALL suppressed when ratio >= minBigWin 15 (marquee owns audio); coin-chime accents at 200/600ms (big) +1100/1700/2300ms (mega) — moot at design volume 0
mixingRules.ambientAutoplay: play on mount + pointerdown/keydown unlock + first-spin fallback; exclusive flag makes double play a no-op
mixingRules.teaseArc: onTeaseStart: duck('ambient-music',350) + play('tease-riser'); onTeaseEnd(hit): fadeStop('tease-riser', hit?120:60) + unduck(500) + play(hit ? 'free-spin-trigger' : 'tease-miss')

schemaNotes: suggest adding 'landing' to symbolAsset (one-shot on reel stop) — Crack Farm exports them under spritesheets.landing_*
extras.rtpNote: rtpBps is the operative certified RTP; targetRtpPct is display metadata only
